tilesets._comment: Tiled tileset JSON for ChatGPT-cyberpunk-city-tileset-layout.png. The image is 1254x1254 px and shows named tile regions (buildings, road tiles, grass tiles, sidewalk tiles) in a layout-style reference, NOT a uniform grid. The explicit `tiles` array below defines the bounding box for each tile so Phaser + Tiled can reference them by id. Tile coordinates are first-pass estimates based on inspection of the source PNG; T4.2 will refine these via Tiled's 'Edit Tileset' panel. Tile sizes vary per region (buildings ~220x260, road/grass tiles ~128x128, sidewalk tiles ~110x110). See the tileset's source PNG for the canonical layout reference.
tilesets._comment_palette_swatch: The 8-color palette swatch at x=60, y=1080 is a visual reference baked into the image — it is NOT a tile and has no entry in this file.
tilesets._comment_map_preview: The right-side region (x=620, y=340, ~600x400) is a 'how-it-looks-assembled' preview map — also not a tile. Real tiles are the named regions only.

tiles._comment: ROAD TILES — 4 cols x 3 rows = 12 variants
tiles.name: road-straight-h

tiles._comment: GRASS TILES — 4 cols x 3 rows = 12 variants
tiles.name: grass-plain

tiles._comment: SIDEWALK TILES — 6 cols x 2 rows = 12 variants
